name: Butternut Squash, Turnip, and Green-Bean Quinoa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sieve, rinse quinoa under cold running water until the water runs clear.
2. In a small saucepan, bring water to a boil with quinoa and salt. Cover and simmer the mixture over moderately low heat for 5 to 10 minutes.
3. Drain the quinoa in the sieve (do not rinse) and spread out on a plate to cool.
4. Peel the turnip and cut into 1/3-inch cubes. Mince the garlic.
5. Slice the scallions thinly on the diagonal and cut beans into 1/3-inch pieces.
6. In a steamer set over 1 inch boiling water, combine squash, turnip, and garlic. Steam the vegetables covered for 7 minutes, or until almost tender.
7. Add beans, quinoa, and salt and pepper to taste. Continue steaming for 3 minutes, or until beans are crisp-tender.
8. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and toss with scallions.
